acculturation_foundations: Acculturation & Foundations in Prompting and General AI Use
advanced_connections: Advanced connections, APIs, artificial brain. Autonomous systems working for you.
ai_agent_desc:
Our site features a conversational AI agent built in n8n. When a visitor asks a question via chat, the message is captured by a trigger and sent to an AI Agent powered by Google Gemini Flash.

How it works:
1. The agent has conversational memory (Simple Memory) to keep discussion context.
2. It's connected to 7 HTTP tools that let it query each page of the site in real-time (Home, Training, Companies, Expertise, Contact, How-it-works, Legal).
3. The agent analyzes the question, queries the right pages, and crafts a personalized response based on the site's actual content.
auto_email_desc: Every client interaction triggers an intelligent email flow, fully automated via n8n. From initial contact to the final thank-you, no email is sent manually. The system adapts at each stage of the client journey to send the right message, at the right time, to the right person.
auto_email_step1: #1 Web Form — As soon as a prospect fills out the contact form, a notification email is sent to the team + a confirmation email to the client.
auto_email_step2: #2 ERP Registration — Upon registration in the Notion ERP, a welcome email is automatically sent if the contact is validated.
auto_email_step3: #3 Satisfaction Survey — After training, a review request email is automatically sent to the client.
auto_email_step4: #4 Publication & Thank You — When the review is published on the site, a thank-you email is sent to the client with a link to their testimonial.

faq_a1:
Yes and No.
For Make, it's 100% No-Code (visual) and accessible to everyone. For n8n, logic basics are helpful to master complex flows (we learn them together). You don't need to be a developer, just curious!
faq_a2: It depends on your pace. Level 1 can be mastered in 2 days (1 hour/day) with mentoring, but for companies, 1 full day. Level 2 requires consistent practice over time. Access to content is lifetime, so you move at your own speed.
faq_q1: Do I need to know how to code?

notion_cms_desc:
Instead of a traditional SQL database, we use Notion as our database in a Headless architecture. The screenshot shows the 'Contact SiteWeb' database in our Notion workspace, with columns: First Name, Last Name, Email, Message, and Creation Date.

How it works:
1. Each contact form submission on the site sends data directly to this Notion database via the API.
2. A PHP script connects to the Notion API to read and write data in real-time.
3. The site caches results for instant display.

This system also handles client reviews, articles, and tracking — everything is centralized in Notion, no code changes needed.

tech_stack_desc: No Wordpress, no Wix. This site is built from scratch in PHP and Vanilla JS, with no front-end framework. Every component is hand-coded: routing, multilingual translation system, Notion API integration, and n8n automations. The goal is simple — maintain full control over code, performance, and architecture.

vscode_desc: What you see here is the actual SlapIA project open in VS Code. The file tree on the left shows the code structure: the api/ folder contains backend scripts (contact, live-counter, satisfaction), assets/ holds CSS, images, JavaScript (carousel, matrix, ROI calculator) and translation files (fr.json / en.json). The open file is the French translation file, where each key maps to a text on the site. Everything is structured manually, no heavy framework — pure vanilla PHP and native JavaScript.
